title: Living in Boulder vlog 3 - 31 - 2017: 1,286 kilometer diameter backgrounds

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual late-night vlog from his Boulder home on a rainy day. He talks about his night-owl sleep schedule, progress on a personal project involving background images/circles of specific diameters for a webpage, and a family lunch visit. He also mentions listening to content about modeling and Google Ads.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Embraces sleeping from 2am to 11am, finds nighttime peaceful and preferable
Feels good momentum now that distances are done and webpage work is starting to feel fun rather than grinding
Wishes he had gotten into computers earlier in life, but tries not to dwell on or complain about it

stances.topic: content creator he listens to (modeling/follow-up room)
stances.position: Has good information but holds wacky political ideas

claims.subject: Boulder
claims.claim: Living in Boulder has been nice with misty, rainy weather recently.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's peaceful to wake up to the rainy weather in Boulder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I prefer sleeping from 2 AM to 11 AM because it's peaceful at night.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't finished my backgrounds yet, specifically the 12, 30s diameters.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to make sure the backgrounds are long enough to avoid looking unprofessional.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I finished working on distances today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I started working on the webpage and making the legs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to work on aerodynamics and circles tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Building the webpage was initially grinding but is now becoming fun.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: One of my big regrets in life is not having a past in computers early on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't like to complain about my regrets.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was studying and listening to a dark movie today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was listening to someone who has a lot of information but wacky political ideas.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was listening to Google Ads again and found it interesting.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm fired up about working on my projects now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I visited my mom's house for lunch because my brother was in town.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I watched a little bit of something during lunch.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to do a video demo of how something works with myself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to explain the demo after doing it.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think I'm pretty odd.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like I've been babbling nonsense for almost 40 minutes.
